title: Lucky Penny
description: Short stories of magical realism invite our imaginations to wander and wonder "what if?"
body:
> When life seems bland or boring, when routine becomes rut and mires our day, perhaps it's time to let a bit of childlike magic into our lives. To see the sprinkle of snow on the coats in our wardrobe or the fairy rings in our gardens. If we look closely, we can still find glimmers of magic shining just around the corner, waiting to be discovered. The short stories in this collection invite our imaginations to wander and wonder “what if?”

## The Writers' Cache compilation

*Lucky Penny* is a short story anthology published by The Writers' Cache. This active group of authors operates out of Cache Valley, Utah. The compilation brings together regional voices to explore themes of imagination and the supernatural. The book highlights the creative output of northern Utah's writing community.

## Finding everyday magic

Routine often turns into a rut. The stories in this collection disrupt the daily grind by introducing childlike magic into ordinary settings. Characters discover snow inside their winter wardrobes and fairy rings hidden in backyard gardens. The authors take mundane situations and ask "what if" to push the boundaries of reality.

## Quick escapes into fantasy

This magical realism short story collection offers an antidote to the blandness of adult life. The narratives demand readers look closely at their surroundings to find glimmers of the impossible waiting just out of sight. The anthology format allows for diverse interpretations of fantasy. It delivers brief, concentrated encounters with wonder.

seo.metaTitle: Lucky Penny | Magical realism short story collection featuring Utah local authors
seo.metaDescription: Escape from the mundane to worlds unknown in this Cache Valley writers anthology of everyday magic fiction short stories.
